title: eliokarmos ciliifer
intro: Eliokarmos ciliifer is a type of flowering plant, scientifically known as Viscum album subsp. ciliatum, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Eliokarmos ciliifer include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. Eliokarmos ciliifer is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also dried for use in traditional remedies.
